heading: Federal land bank mortgage transactions
label: 1011 Federal land bank mortgage transactions
text: Whoever, being a mortgagee, knowingly makes any false statement in any paper, proposal, or letter, relating to the sale of any mortgage, to any Federal land bank; orWhoever, being an appraiser, willfully over-values any land securing such mortgage—Shall be fined under this title or imprisoned not more than one year, or both.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on , U.S.C., 1940 ed., Banks and Banking (, seventh paragraph, as added , ).section 987 of title 12July 17, 1916, ch. 245, § 31June 16, 1933, ch. 98, § 7848 Stat. 272Minor changes were made in phraseology.
Amendments1994— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $5,000” in last par.Pub. L. 103–322
